un_sdg_target.target_description: By 2030, reduce by one third premature mortality from non-communicable diseases through prevention and treatment and promote mental health and well-being.

vocal_jitter.definition: Cycle-to-cycle variation in the fundamental frequency (F0) of voice.
vocal_jitter.mathematical_definition: Average absolute difference between a period and its three-period local average, normalized by the average period.

vocal_shimmer.definition: Cycle-to-cycle variation in the peak amplitude of the voice signal.
clinical_correlates: Upper respiratory tract mucosal swelling (e.g., laryngitis, COPD flare-up)
Neuromuscular weakness affecting vocal fold tension

edge_compute_specification.audio_pipeline: Browser-native Web Audio API (AnalyserNode / ScriptProcessorNode / AudioWorklet)
edge_compute_specification.privacy_model: 100% Client-Side Processing. Zero raw audio data transmitted to backend servers.
